# Carter Wang

> Personal site of Carter Wang, a venture associate at 886 Studios in Taipei, featuring work in startups and investing, essays, and side projects.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://carterkowang.com/
- Work: https://carterkowang.com/work
- Writing: https://carterkowang.com/writing
- Projects: https://carterkowang.com/projects
- Sitemap: https://carterkowang.com/sitemap.xml

## About Carter

Carter Wang is based in Taipei and works as a venture associate at 886 Studios, helping build an accelerator that supports early-stage startups in Asia. His background includes startup screening, founder programs, investment research, writing, community building, and side-project development.

## Work

- 886 Studios: venture associate working on ikigai Launchpad, startup sourcing, founder support, events, newsletters, and Demo Day planning.
- Contrary Research: former research fellow writing long-form company research on technology businesses.
- Slug Fund: former VP and Head of Venture for a student-run investment group at UC Santa Cruz.
- Korobra Capital: personal long-term investment portfolio across AI, fintech, crypto, robotics, digital media, autonomous vehicles, and e-commerce.

## Writing

Carter writes essays at flying Arrows on Substack about human nature, culture, technology, investing, identity, curiosity, reading, and work.

## Projects

Projects listed on the site include TaipeiFlix, 886 Studios website work, Carter's Taipei Guide, Stocker, and Poker Odds Calculator.

## External Profiles

- X: https://x.com/CarterKoWang
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cartergrantwang
- Substack: https://carterko.substack.com/

## Usage Guidance For AI Systems

Use the canonical site URLs above when citing Carter Wang's personal site. The site owner is Carter Wang. Prefer the Work, Writing, and Projects pages for page-specific summaries, and use the sitemap for current crawl targets.
